target_idiom: กระเชอก้นรั่ว
target_meaning: person who lacks restraint in spending money; prodigal person; extravagant person.

target_idiom: การฆ่าช้างเอางา
target_meaning: abstract noun of ฆ่าช้างเอางา (kâa-cháang-ao-ngaa)

target_idiom: กำขี้ดีกว่ากำตด
target_meaning: something is better than nothing; half a loaf is better than none.

target_idiom: กินข้าวแดง
target_meaning: to be imprisoned for a crime.

target_idiom: ไก่โห่
target_meaning: cockcrow.

target_idiom: ไก่อ่อน
source_meaning: in the very early stages of something; still green; wet behind the ears
target_meaning: chicken; greenhorn; naif; colt.

target_idiom: ข้าวยากหมากแพง
target_meaning: dearth: scarcity and dearness of food.

target_idiom: แข็งข้อ
source_meaning: to stand up to; to affront
target_meaning: to refuse to yield, to refuse to submit; to offer resistance, to show opposition

target_idiom: คนในอยากออก คนนอกอยากเข้า
target_meaning: People inside want to get out, and people outside want to get in.

target_idiom: จงอางหวงไข่
source_meaning: treating something precious with extreme care
target_meaning: one who is exceedingly possessive or protective of someone or something

source_idiom: verle el ojo a la papa
target_idiom: เจาะไข่แดง
target_meaning: to take a woman's virginity; to pop someone's cherry.

target_idiom: ใจพระ
target_meaning: kind; kindhearted; benevolent; merciful.

target_idiom: ดาวรุ่ง
target_meaning: rising star

target_idiom: ได้หน้า
source_meaning: to praise to the skies, to sing the praises of (to speak highly of)
target_meaning: to receive good reputation, honour, credit, praise, compliment, etc.

target_idiom: ได้หน้าได้ตา
source_meaning: to show one's worth, after losing reputation in the past
target_meaning: to gain credit, honour, or good reputation.

target_idiom: ตามใจปากลำบากท้อง
source_meaning: to have eyes bigger than one's stomach
target_meaning: If you have eyes bigger than your stomach, you will suffer.

source_idiom: tener más orgullo que don Rodrigo en la horca
target_idiom: ตีปีก
target_meaning: to be overjoyed; to be elated.

target_idiom: ทำใจ
target_meaning: to force oneself, reconcile oneself, or come (as to accept something painful or difficult).

target_idiom: นกสองหัว
target_meaning: double-dealing person; two-faced person; hypocritical person.

target_idiom: นานทีปีหน
target_meaning: very seldom; very rarely; almost never.

target_idiom: น้ำใสใจคอ
target_meaning: true nature; true characteristic; unpretending mind; actual attitude; actual disposition.

target_idiom: ใบ้แดก
target_meaning: to be temporarily deprived of speech, especially by strong emotion.

target_idiom: ปลาซิวปลาสร้อย
source_meaning: nobody; zero; small fry (person of little value and unimportant)
target_meaning: minnow: comparatively small or insignificant person.

target_idiom: ปากกาคมกว่าดาบ
target_meaning: the pen is mightier than the sword.

target_idiom: ปลาเน่าตัวเดียวเหม็นทั้งข้อง
target_meaning: one bad person ruins the entire community; one bad person negatively influences everyone he comes into contact with; one bad person ruins everyone who associates with him.

target_idiom: ป้ายสี
target_meaning: to slander; to smear; to sully, vilify, or soil a good name, reputation, etc.

target_idiom: ปีหน้าฟ้าใหม่
target_meaning: new year; next year; year to come; year ahead.

target_idiom: ผิดเป็นครู
target_meaning: Blunders are lessons. / Experience is the mother of wisdom.

target_idiom: ผีไม่มีศาล
target_meaning: homeless person.

target_idiom: ผู้ดีตีนแดง
target_meaning: noble person, person of noble birth, well-born and well-bred person, person from a wealthy family, or person from the upper class, especially one who is spoiled or does not know how or refuses to do housework or hard work.

target_idiom: พูดไปสองไพเบี้ย นิ่งเสียตำลึงทอง
target_meaning: speech is silver, silence is golden

target_idiom: เพื่อนกิน
target_meaning: fair-weather friend.

target_idiom: พกนุ่น
source_meaning: to be a sucker; to be easily fooled
target_meaning: easily influenced; gullible; credulous.

target_idiom: ฟางเส้นสุดท้าย
target_meaning: last straw.

source_idiom: vivir por encima de sus posibilidades
target_idiom: มือเติบ
target_meaning: to lack restraint in spending money; to spend much more money than is necessary or wise; to be prodigal; to be extravagant.

target_idiom: ยอมงอ ไม่ยอมหัก
target_meaning: better bend than break.

target_idiom: รับมือ
target_meaning: to handle; to deal (with); to cope (with).

target_idiom: รับฟัง
source_meaning: to take into account; to keep in mind
target_meaning: to take into account; to accept into consideration; to listen to and consider.

target_idiom: ลิ้นสองแฉก
target_meaning: duplicitous; double-dealing.

target_idiom: วันดีคืนดี
target_meaning: one fine day.

target_idiom: ส่งไม้ต่อ
target_meaning: to let someone do or be something as one's successor; to pass (a role, position, office, etc) to someone; to pass (on) the torch.

target_idiom: สำเนียงส่อภาษา กิริยาส่อสกุล
source_meaning: the last piece of food left on a plate, mannersbit, manners piece
target_meaning: manners maketh man.

target_idiom: สู้ยิบตา
source_meaning: to be enthusiastic against challenges; to adapt easily to difficulties.
target_meaning: to continue fighting despite difficulty or being unnerved; to fight without giving up

target_idiom: เสน่ห์ปลายจวัก
target_meaning: cooking talent.

target_idiom: หน้าซื่อใจคด
target_meaning: hypocritical

target_idiom: หนึ่งในตองอู
target_meaning: exceptional person; the smartest person; the one of a kind; the one and only.

target_idiom: หน้าใหญ่ใจโต
target_meaning: extravagant or prodigal, especially in a showy manner.

target_idiom: หมาหัวเน่า
source_meaning: black sheep (a person who is not wholesome, honest, or trustworthy)
target_meaning: person generally despised or avoided: outcast, pariah, leper, etc.

target_idiom: หล่อหลอม
target_meaning: to shape; to fashion; to mould.

target_idiom: หัวโต๊ะ
source_meaning: head honcho, big cheese, fat cat
target_meaning: head; leader; chief; chairperson; president; presiding officer.

target_idiom: หูเบา
source_meaning: to take someone's word for it; to believe what somebody says
target_meaning: easily believing in what one hears; willing to believe too readily; credulous.

target_idiom: เห็นขี้ดีกว่าไส้
source_meaning: To hold in high regard; to think highly of; to have a lot of time for
target_meaning: to regard someone else as better than one's own relatives.

target_idiom: หูหนวกตาบอด
target_meaning: deaf and blind: unwilling or refusing to perceive or understand; lacking perception, awareness, or judgement; not controlled by reason.

target_idiom: เอาลูกเขามาเลี้ยงเอาเมี่ยงเขามาอม
target_meaning: To take another person's duty or burden which can result in something unexpectable or unfavourable.
